name: Death Note
author: opfromthestart
bootlegger: Minion and outsider counts are arbitrary.
L is always an in-play character.
If the win condition of either team changes, this will be announced on day 1. The specific change will not be announced.
Private chats to the storyteller can also be done from DMs.
Every game gets an episode title that may give a hint.

name: L
ability: Each day, privately guess what the Amnesiac's ability is: you learn how accurate you are. The Amnesiac learns what you guess the following night. If you get a bingo, you and the Amnesiac learn each other. If L dies before getting a bingo, the Amnesiac's ability becomes stronger. Start knowing the setup counts.

name: Amnesiac
ability: You do not know what your ability is. Each day, choose between asking a question or receiving one true and one false statement about your ability.
